# UsageDeck 0.6.0 beta 4

This beta makes notification settings easier to understand and tailor by keeping each provider's alert rules with its other settings.

## Improvements

- Configure limit warnings, resets, service incidents, and usage-connection alerts separately for each provider from that provider's settings page. Existing notification choices are copied to every provider automatically when upgrading.
- Find the app-wide notification switch, Windows delivery status, test action, and Windows settings action together on a simpler Notifications page.
- Settings confirmation and error messages now dismiss themselves after a short delay instead of remaining open until closed manually.

## Fixes

- Notification test and Windows settings buttons now show their complete labels without clipping.
